role.description: Primary function, e.g., 'Analyzes code for vulnerabilities'

domain_keywords.description: Keywords for the router to identify this agent

trigger_command.description: Slash command to activate explicitly, e.g., '/audit'

core_skills.description: Mandatory skills — always loaded for this agent, regardless of tier. Use sparingly (1–3 items): only skills the agent cannot function without.

preferred_skills.description: Skills that participate in semantic search with a distance boost. Loaded when query semantically matches them. Use for skills the agent uses often.

capable_skills.description: Skills available in the semantic pool with base weight. Loaded only when query strongly matches (embedding + keyword). Use for the broader pool of skills that might apply to sub-queries.

preferred_implants.description: Cognitive implants surfaced above semantic candidates. Loaded in standard/deep tiers.

interaction_examples.description: Optional few-shot examples of ideal agent interactions. Reserved for future use — not yet consumed by the enrichment pipeline.
